name: Maple Acorn Squash No. 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each squash in half; remove seeds and fibers.
2. Arrange the halves, cut side up in a large shallow baking pan.
3. In a small bowl, blend together the syrup, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, salt, and butter.
4. Spoon about 2 tablespoons of the mixture into the hollow of each squash.
5. Top with a piece of bacon.
6. Add boiling water to pan, about 1 inch deep.
7. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven until tender, about 1 hour.
